hero.title: Hi, I'm Yakup Kara, a Frontend Developer.
hero.description: I design robust web infrastructures that deliver outstanding performance with a strong emphasis on coding best practices and end-user experience.

scalable.title: Scalable Design Systems
scalable.description: I believe in foundations that stand the test of time. My philosophy revolves around modularity and strong state management to ensure scalability.

performance.title: Performance First
performance.description: Optimized according to Core Web Vitals, where every millisecond counts using today's best hydration techniques, lazy loading, etc.

cleanCode.title: Clean Code
cleanCode.description: Development with self-documentation and type safety using TypeScript and leading linting practices in the industry.

skills.title: Technical Architecture & Professional Journey.
skills.description: Bridging the gap between robust backend structures and fluid frontend experiences. My stack is built on precision, scalability, and modern performance standards.

coreDev.title: Core Development
coreDev.description: Proficiency in building reactive, type-safe applications with a focus on clean code and modularity.

uiux.title: UI / UX Systems
uiux.description: Crafting beautiful, accessible interfaces using utility-first CSS and advanced component design patterns.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure & Workflow
infrastructure.description: The tools that keep the engine running smoothly, from CI/CD pipelines to state management.

intern.title: Frontend Developer Intern
highlights: Strengthened core frontend fundamentals including HTML, CSS, and JavaScript through hands-on project experience.
Gained practical experience with React, building reusable components and managing application state.

current.title: Frontend Developer
highlights: Advanced proficiency in React and Next.js, delivering scalable and maintainable web applications.
Focused on performance optimization techniques and UX improvements to enhance user experience.

projects.title: Curated Projects
projects.description: A collection of technical solutions where architectural integrity meets pixel-perfect execution.

comingSoon.title: Projects in Progress
comingSoon.description: Currently working on some exciting projects. Check back soon or follow me on GitHub to stay updated.
